pages.text: Zindzi and Tim Tam were best friends. They did everything together.
‘Do you want to play dress-up?’ ‘No thank you,’ said Zindzi. asked Oswin. ‘I’ll play dress-up with Tim Tam.’
‘Do you want to do a puzzle with me?’ asked Kaya. ‘No thank you,’ said Zindzi. ‘I like doing puzzles with Tim Tam.’
‘Do you want to join our scooter race?’ asked The Twins. ‘No thank you,’ said Zindzi. ‘I’ll race with Tim Tam.’
One day, Tim Tam didn’t come to school. ‘Tim Tam is sick,’ said Teacher. ‘Why don’t you play with your other friends, Zindzi?’
Oswin was making a Get Well Soon card for Tim Tam. my ‘But… Tim Tam is best friend,’ said Zindzi.
‘You can help me,’ said Oswin. ‘Dip dip, dab dab.’ ‘Dip dip, dab dab,’ said Zindzi.
When the card was done, The day after that, Oswin and Zindzi the three of them rode scooters played dress-up. with The Twins. The next day, they played hopscotch with Kaya.
On Monday, Tim Tam came back to school. ‘Let’s go read a book with Oswin!’ said Zindzi.
new ‘Is Oswin your best friend now?’ ‘He’s my friend,’ said Zindzi. asked Tim Tam. ‘He’s your friend too! Look, we made you a card.’
‘Okay,’ said Tim Tam. ‘Let’s all be best friends!’
